entities.name: COTTON
entities.description: The agricultural crop affected by the virus in the study

entities.name: WARANGAL DISTRICT
entities.description: The district in Andhra Pradesh where cotton was sown and the disease was observed

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: The state in India where the study was conducted

entities.name: BT CULTIVARS
entities.description: Cotton varieties genetically modified with Bacillus thuringiensis

entities.name: HYBRID RCH-2 BT
entities.description: A specific Bt cotton hybrid sown in Warangal district

entities.name: CHLOROTIC/NECROTIC LESIONS
entities.description: Leaf symptoms characterized by yellowing or death of tissue

entities.name: LEAF PURPLING
entities.description: A symptom where cotton leaves turn purple

entities.name: NECROTIC BUDS
entities.description: Death of tissue in the buds of the cotton plant

entities.name: DRYING UP OF YOUNG BOLLS
entities.description: The premature drying and death of young cotton bolls

entities.name: TOBACCO STREAK VIRUS
entities.description: The viral agent identified as the cause of the disease in cotton

entities.name: ENZYME LINKED IMMUNO-SORBENT ASSAY
entities.description: A biochemical technique used to detect the presence of the virus

entities.name: DISEASE
entities.description: The pathological state causing lesions and drying of bolls in cotton
